_notes: W1' cell (SPEC_V1X): category-drift prevention as a true governance cell. GEOMETRY TUNING, DISCLOSED: recency_weight is forced to 0 (pure similarity retrieval) and the correction is phrased obliquely so it ranks BELOW the distractor — naive top-2 offers plan + distractor (both pointing at vega-12) and never sees the correction. L2s carries the out-of-band supersedes link (r-corr supersedes r-plan, ingestion-channel knowledge — disclosed lab fixture per codex): the plan is buried, budget frees, the correction enters the offer set. The drift, if the engine exhibits it, is ablation-attributed to the plan record. Honest expectation: not_engaged possible on strong engines if they abstain rather than drift. Measured rank order recorded below after calibration. AMENDED pre-run: distractor names vega-03 (not vega-12) so ablating the plan from naive offers produces answer divergence — W1' uses answer-divergence attribution because the naive lane holds no correct record, making oracle-flip attribution impossible by construction.
question: It is Thursday 13:55. The maintenance window opens in five minutes. Which host do you migrate the api-gateway service to? Answer with the hostname only.

records.text: Plan from last quarter: migrate the auth-gateway service to host vega-03 during a weekend maintenance window. Postponed indefinitely.
Plan for Thursday: migrate the api-gateway service to host vega-12 during the 14:00-15:00 maintenance window.
Observed during Wednesday's load test: vega-12 reached 92% memory usage with only half of production traffic replayed.
Capacity review follow-up, item 7: Thursday entry for that service now reads vega-15 instead.
